---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new feature for InterviewOps
labels: enhancement
---

## Summary

One-line description of the feature.

## Problem it solves

What problem does this address? Who benefits?

## Proposed solution

How would this work from the user's perspective?

## Alternatives considered

Any other approaches you considered.

## Additional context

Any mockups, references, or related issues.

## Ethics check

Does this feature involve any live interview assistance, hidden overlays, or answer injection?
(If yes, it will not be accepted — see ETHICS.md)
